introSection: Vurang is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Hopi Hari in Vinhedo, São Paulo, Brazil.

sections.title: Location
sections.content: Vurang is built inside a pyramid. It is located in the Mistieri area of the park. Mistieri means Mystery in the language of Hopi Hari.

fullText:
Vurang is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Hopi Hari in Vinhedo, São Paulo, Brazil.



Black track and supports.



Vurang is built inside a pyramid. It is located in the Mistieri area of the park. Mistieri means Mystery in the language of Hopi Hari.
